TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_James_Belushi, title = James_Belushi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Belushi} }

S.FORM: Jim Belushi (James Belushi) Ryax 15, byacing 6 kawas 1954 ka hintgan nya squ Cikako, hiya ga squliq ka pzyangay psyaqan ega, gmbang hngzyang, ppqwas ru kbalay honggaku; sswe ni John Belushi, ru pzyangay ega ka Robert Belushi ga, laqi nya. yaba nya ga Adam Anastos Belushi, minkahul squ Albania. mincyugal qu minkekong nya, te qutux hiya ga aring kawas 1980 metaq 1988, qutux laqi nya ka Robert Belushi, te sazing hya ga, aring squ 1990 metaq 1992, te cyugal hya ga, aring squ 1998 ru tehuk soni qani. Qutux mlikuy ki kneril laqi nha. Minnaki squ Illinois raygaku ga, suqul nya mqbaq tuqiy na pinqzyu ru kinbaqan na Yisu na pzyangay. Aring squ kawas te 1977 tehuk 1980, msqun ki qbsuzyan nya John Belushi, mluw squ lahuy pzyangay na Cikaku "te sazing qalang" msqun mtzyuaw. Ryax kawas 1978 nasa ga, suqun nya kbalay kamok na teribi nqu phtuw squ pcywagan nya sa terebi. Pincywagan nya squ smi hngzyang ke' ga blaq uzi, iyat nanak ega qu ssyan nya hngzyang, nanu qu ppi'an na tenaw uzi ga musa psi hngzyang uzi. Te 5 byacing 2006 kawas ga, minhtuw te qutux biru: Real Don't Apologize Kawas te 2008, sanka sa mari klkah nqu Illinois. Kawas te 2012, rmaw squ syoto na Amerika Opama, lahuy na Minsyu, musa psenkyo syoto lozi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

Jim Belushi (James Belushi) Ryax 15, byacing 6 kawas 1954 ka hintgan nya squ Cikako, hiya ga squliq ka pzyangay psyaqan ega, gmbang hngzyang, ppqwas ru kbalay honggaku; sswe ni John Belushi, ru pzyangay ega ka Robert Belushi ga, laqi nya. yaba nya ga Adam Anastos Belushi, minkahul squ Albania. mincyugal qu minkekong nya, te qutux hiya ga aring kawas 1980 metaq 1988, qutux laqi nya ka Robert Belushi, te sazing hya ga, aring squ 1990 metaq 1992, te cyugal hya ga, aring squ 1998 ru tehuk soni qani. Qutux mlikuy ki kneril laqi nha. Minnaki squ Illinois raygaku ga, suqul nya mqbaq tuqiy na pinqzyu ru kinbaqan na Yisu na pzyangay. Aring squ kawas te 1977 tehuk 1980, msqun ki qbsuzyan nya John Belushi, mluw squ lahuy pzyangay na Cikaku "te sazing qalang" msqun mtzyuaw. Ryax kawas 1978 nasa ga, suqun nya kbalay kamok na teribi nqu phtuw squ pcywagan nya sa terebi. Pincywagan nya squ smi hngzyang ke' ga blaq uzi, iyat nanak ega qu ssyan nya hngzyang, nanu qu ppi'an na tenaw uzi ga musa psi hngzyang uzi. Te 5 byacing 2006 kawas ga, minhtuw te qutux biru: Real Don't Apologize Kawas te 2008, sanka sa mari klkah nqu Illinois. Kawas te 2012, rmaw squ syoto na Amerika Opama, lahuy na Minsyu, musa psenkyo syoto lozi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *im βelus~ɕħi (*ames~ɕ βelus~ɕħi) rjax **, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * kawas~ɕ **** ka ħintɣan nja s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨikako, ħija ɣa s~ɕquliq ka pzjaŋaj ps~ɕjaqan eɣa, ɣmβaŋ ħŋzjaŋ, ppqwas~ɕ ru kβalaj ħoŋɣaku; s~ɕs~ɕwe ni *oħn βelus~ɕħi, ru pzjaŋaj eɣa ka roβert βelus~ɕħi ɣa, laqi nja. jaβa nja ɣa a*am anas~ɕtos~ɕ βelus~ɕħi, minkaħul s~ɕqu alβania. minʦ~ʨjuɣal qu minkekoŋ nja, te qutux ħija ɣa ariŋ kawas~ɕ **** metaq ****, qutux laqi nja ka roβert βelus~ɕħi, te s~ɕaziŋ ħja ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕqu **** metaq ****, te ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħja ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕqu **** ru teħuk s~ɕoni qani. qutux mlikuj ki kneril laqi nħa. minnaki s~ɕqu illinois~ɕ rajɣaku ɣa, s~ɕuqul nja mqβaq tuqij na pinqzju ru kinβaqan na jis~ɕu na pzjaŋaj. ariŋ s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ te **** teħuk ****, ms~ɕqun ki qβs~ɕuzjan nja *oħn βelus~ɕħi, mluw s~ɕqu laħuj pzjaŋaj na ʦ~ʨikaku "te s~ɕaziŋ qalaŋ" ms~ɕqun mtzjuaw. rjax kawas~ɕ **** nas~ɕa ɣa, s~ɕuqun nja kβalaj kamok na teriβi nqu pħtuw s~ɕqu pʦ~ʨjwaɣan nja s~ɕa tereβi. pinʦ~ʨjwaɣan nja s~ɕqu s~ɕmi ħŋzjaŋ keʔ ɣa βlaq uzi, ijat nanak eɣa qu s~ɕs~ɕjan nja ħŋzjaŋ, nanu qu ppiʔan na tenaw uzi ɣa mus~ɕa ps~ɕi ħŋzjaŋ uzi. te * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ **** kawas~ɕ ɣa, minħtuw te qutux βiru: real *onʔt apoloɣize kawas~ɕ te ****, s~ɕanka s~ɕa mari klkaħ nqu illinois~ɕ. kawas~ɕ te ****, rmaw s~ɕqu s~ɕjoto na amerika opama, laħuj na mins~ɕju, mus~ɕa ps~ɕenkjo s~ɕjoto lozi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
